subject: refactor(cleanup): deduplicate tag pills, classification badges, and worker timeouts
body:
Reduce code duplication identified by codebase audit:
- Extract .tag-pill CSS class to index.css (3 components)
- Create ClassificationBadge component (TransactionTable had 2 identical copies)
- Extract ML worker timeout utils to shared workerTimeout.ts module
- Fix ConfirmDialog button order (Cancel left, Confirm right per platform convention)
- Add debugLog to useTagInput catch block for diagnostics
- Remove unused safeRemoveItem export from useSafeStorage

Tags: cleanup, dedup, ux, ml, css
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch
